title: TaskListCardData
description: Data payload for a `task-list` card (CardEnvelope.data when type='task-list').

mode.description: v1 supports only 'select' (toggle + confirm). 'progress' (live AG-UI status) is a future enum value; restricting it now keeps the wire forward-compatible.

heading.description: Optional in-body heading; distinct from CardEnvelope.title.

tasks.description: The selectable rows, rendered in order.

id.description: Stable id; the selected ids are returned in the result. Unique within `tasks`.

description.description: Optional secondary line under the label.

checked.description: Initial checked state of the row.

disabled.description: Row is shown but not toggleable (and excluded from select-all).

selectAll.description: Render a master select-all checkbox above the list.

allowEmpty.description: If true, confirm is enabled with zero selected (emits { selected: [] }). If false, confirm is disabled until >=1 selected.

min.description: Optional minimum number that must be selected to confirm.

max.description: Optional maximum selectable; further toggles are blocked once reached.
